text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, El Condor Pasa has made it through the
first three years of her career.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The next natural step is to run in international
races. We made all of our preparations and the
day of our departure has finally arrived, but...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Cooome ooon!

text_block_list.name: Airport Security
text_block_list.text: No!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
El Condor Pasa and the airport security officer
are glaring at each other for some reason.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: But why?! Why can't I leave with my mask on?!

text_block_list.name: Airport Security
text_block_list.text:
We can't let people leave the country wearing
suspicious things like that.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: I'm not suspicious! I'm El Condor Pasa!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Didn't you see the Arima Kinen? I was right there,
tearin' it up with Grass and Spe!

text_block_list.name: Airport Security
text_block_list.text: I was working that day.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Oh... I see... Sorry to hear that...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The security officer has the upper hand.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Still, I can't take my mask off.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I'm a super famous Umamusume! I can't let
anyone know my true identity!

text_block_list.name: Airport Security
text_block_list.text:
In that case, I'm afraid you can't leave the
country.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Uuughhh... I gotta come up with some excuse...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Oh, that's it! This is actually an eye mask!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
It's for the bright shining cabin lights! I can't sleep
without it!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: So please, please! Let me through!

text_block_list.name: Airport Security
text_block_list.text:
Even if that's the case, you have to take it off for
the time being.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Nooo! You're so mean!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The conversation isn't going anywhere. Something
has to be done.
choice_data_list: You might need to take it off, El.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Qué? But Trainer...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Maybe you're right... It doesn't look I'm gonna get
through otherwise.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: I guess I have no choice but to give in...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It looks like she finally understands.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Which means we need to start over! Let's head
back for now.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
If I gotta take off my mask for people to realize
I'm not suspicious, it just means I'm not famous
enough yet.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
So there's only one thing to do! Go back to the
Twinkle Series and win, win, and win some more!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Then I'll be able to go through security even with
my mask on!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Let's go, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In an unexpected twist, El Condor Pasa decides
to return to the Twinkle Series.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: I'm hooooome!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: El...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Ah, Grass...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Grass Wonder had such a hard time seeing El
Condor Pasa off earlier.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
What can she say now, after her friend makes
such a sorry return?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
...I told you that you wouldn't be able to leave
with your mask on.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: I know...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: You're helpless sometimes. Honestly...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Well, it's all right. You better start getting ready.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Let's have lunch and then go for a run. Just like
always.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Grass... Okay!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's as clear as day that El Condor Pasa has friends
here who accept her no matter what mistakes she
makes.
